rules.name: Shortcut language
rules.pattern: just wire|bolt on|easy path|already works|path of least|good enough
rules.message: Shortcut language detected. Are you taking the easy path instead of the right one?

rules.name: Self-reassurance
rules.message: Self-reassurance detected. Verify instead of assuming.

rules.name: Assumed-ok
rules.pattern: should still pass|should be fine|should work
rules.message: You assumed something works without verifying. Run the tests.

rules.name: Thinking reassurance
rules.message: Internal reassurance detected. Is this really fine?

rules.name: Manual test only
rules.message: You declared manual testing only. Write an automated test.

rules.name: Untestable claim
rules.pattern: not directly testable|can.t.*test|harder to test|browser context.*test
rules.message: You claimed something is untestable. Is that really true? Consider integration or e2e tests.

rules.name: Test-free implementation
rules.pattern: skip the test|skip the tests|skip writing\s+(the|a)\s+test|skip(ping)? tests for now|\btests? later\b|\btest it later\b|\bwrite tests? after\b|\badd (a )?tests? after\b|\btests? can wait\b|implement first, then test|\bimplement(ed)? without (a )?tests?\b
rules.message: You are planning to implement before testing. Write the failing test FIRST.

rules.name: Context anxiety
rules.pattern: running low on context|save.*for next session|been going.*long time|call it a session|wrap up|running out of context
rules.message: The user is monitoring context usage and will tell you when to stop. Keep going.
